message:
feat(panels): migrate timeline panel rendering to bubbles/table

Replace manual string-building in the timeline panel with a proper
bubbles/table.Model for structured, scrollable timeline display.

- Add initTable(), rebuildTimelineTableRows(), timelineTableHeight(),
  timelineTableColumns() for table lifecycle management
- Add renderTimelineBarText() — plain-text version of the timeline bar
  for table cell content (no ANSI styling conflicts with table renderer)
- Pass focus/blur state to table model for correct highlight behavior
- Fix stats line rendering for correct scoping
- Add debug logging for timeline bracket test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
